title: Parameters for RoI PointCloud Fusion Node

UNKNOWN.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with UNKNOWN class.

CAR.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with CAR class.

TRUCK.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with TRUCK class.

BUS.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with BUS class.

TRAILER.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with TRAILER class.

MOTORCYCLE.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with MOTORCYCLE class.

BICYCLE.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with BICYCLE class.

PEDESTRIAN.description: Whether to enable fusion for objects with PEDESTRIAN class.

override_class_with_unknown.description: Whether to override class of fused output cluster with UNKNOWN.

min_cluster_size.description: The minimum number of points that a cluster must contain to be considered as valid.

max_cluster_size.description: The maximum number of points that a cluster must contain to be considered as valid.

cluster_2d_tolerance.description: A cluster tolerance measured in radial direction [m]

roi_scale_factor.description: A scale factor for resizing RoI while checking if points are inside the RoI.

max_object_size.description: The maximum size of the object to be considered as valid.
